name: mekari-tools
description: Internal Claude Code plugins for Mekari Mobile team

plugins.name: patrol-qa-automation
plugins.description: Claude Code agents and skills for Patrol-based mobile UI test automation. Generate, author, and debug Patrol integration tests for Flutter apps — with wait-strategy, soft-assert, and flakiness-hardening patterns.

plugins.name: designer-agent
plugins.description: Design spec agent that converts Figma, images, or text requirements into purposeful UI/UX designs with ASCII wireframes and verified Mekari Pixel widget recommendations.

plugins.name: feature-flag-cleanup
plugins.description: Automated feature flag cleanup agent. Discovers flag usages, transforms conditional code (graduate or drop), cascades cleanup via static analysis, and updates tests/config/docs. Supports Dart, Kotlin, and Swift.

plugins.name: code-review-agent
plugins.description: AI-powered Bitbucket PR review agent with multi-persona analysis. Combines deterministic pipeline review with specialized Security, Performance, and Quality sub-agents.

plugins.name: sync-upstream
plugins.description: Sync project-locally installed (vendored) plugins with the upstream mekari-tools marketplace repo. Three-way merges upstream changes into local plugin copies while preserving project-specific tailoring. Update-only: never adds or removes plugins.
